FROM 630 PM TO 845 PM...NUMEROUS WASHOUTS ON HIGHWAY 328 AND HIGHWAY 27 NEAR OAKDALE WITH SEVERAL AREAS OF THE ROADS DAMAGED. THE BRIDGE ON EAST MAIN STREET IN OAKDALE AND WHICH CROSSES OVER MUDLICK CREEK IS PARTIALLY WASHED OUT DUE TO MUDLICK CREEK OVERFLOWING. MANY ROADS AND STREETS IN OAKDALE HAD HIGH WATER PROBLEMS AS OF 940 PM...THE FLOODING AND HIGH WATER PROBLEMS HAVE ENDED.
THE JUNCTION OF HIGHWAY 27 AND HIGHWAY 61 CLOSED DUE TO HIGH WATER. AS OF 930 PM...THE JUNCTION OF THE TWO HIGHWAYS IS STILL CLOSED.
